channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Radio reporter shot dead in Malidegao, Cotabato
item.description: A radio reporter and barangay official, Nestor Micator, 56, was killed in an ambush by unidentified gunmen on May 21, 2026, in Barangay Fort Pikit, Malidegao, Cotabato. Micator, who worked for Empire ...

item.title: President Ruto announces Sh10 drop in diesel prices following stakeholder talks
item.description: President William Ruto has directed a Sh10 reduction in diesel prices for the upcoming June/July pricing cycle, following discussions with transport and fuel sector stakeholders. The decision comes af...

item.title: PNP investigates police involvement in secret meetings related to missing sabungeros case
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has launched a formal investigation into allegations of secret meetings involving relatives of missing sabungeros, amid concerns over police officers’ potential in...

item.title: Brittany Williams and Josh Allen End Six-Year Relationship: What We Know
item.description: Brittany Williams and Josh Allen called it quits in April 2023 after six years together, though neither has revealed the exact reasons behind the split. Their relationship started back in 2017, but th...

item.title: Activist Justice Crack Thanks Nigerians After Release From DSS Custody
item.description: Social commentator and activist, Justice Chidiebere, better known online as 'Justice Crack', don finally break silence after him release from DSS custody. For one statement wey him post for him verifi...

item.title: Anderson Cooper Reflects on the End of Stephen Colbert’s ‘The Late Show’
item.description: As Stephen Colbert’s long-running late-night program, 'The Late Show,' aired its final episode on Thursday, Anderson Cooper shared his reflections on the impact of the show. Cooper recounted his appea...

item.title: Onoh Explains Why Aburi Accord Collapsed, Blames Federal Government Not Ojukwu
item.description: Denge Josef Onoh, wey be former Southeast Spokesman to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu and Chairman of the Forum of Former Members of Enugu State House of Assembly, don yan true story about Aburi Accord w...

item.title: Tundu Lissu’s Assistant Escapes Kidnap, Raising Political Security Concerns
item.description: Tundu Lissu, one of Tanzania’s main opposition leaders, has shared details about a frightening experience involving the kidnapping of his personal assistant in Dar es Salaam. This event has brought se...

item.title: Ticketmaster partners with SM Prime to launch SM Ticketmaster in the Philippines
item.description: Ticketmaster is set to officially enter the Philippine market through a partnership with SM Prime Holdings Incorporated (SMPH). Under this new collaboration, SM Tickets will be rebranded and transitio...

item.title: US Government Invests in Australian Quantum Computing Start-ups
item.description: The Trump administration has extended its investment portfolio to Australian-founded quantum computing companies, signalling international recognition for local technology. Sydney-based Diraq, a spin-...

item.title: Andhra Pradesh launches 600 MW solar power projects in Kadapa to boost clean energy
item.description: On Friday, Andhra Pradesh IT Minister Nara Lokesh inaugurated two significant solar power projects in Kadapa district, marking a major milestone for the state's renewable energy sector. The projects, ...

item.title: HMD Launches Vibe 2 5G Smartphone with Indian AI Chatbot Indus Preloaded
item.description: Finnish phone manufacturer HMD Global has introduced its Vibe 2 5G smartphone, which comes preinstalled with Indus, a chatbot developed by Indian AI startup Sarvam. Announced earlier at the India AI S...

item.title: Severe heatwave in India drives rise in heatstroke cases, hospitals report critical patients
item.description: India is grappling with an intense heatwave that has led to a significant rise in heatstroke cases, particularly in northern states such as Uttar Pradesh and the capital, Delhi. Andhra Pradesh alone h...

item.title: PCB Announces 16-Member Pakistan Squad for Upcoming ODIs Against Australia
item.description: Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has announced a 16-member squad for the forthcoming three-match ODI series against Australia, which is scheduled from May 30 to June 4 in Rawalpindi and Lahore. Shaheen Sh...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Concludes 'The Late Show' with Celebrity Tributes and Subtle Critiques of CBS and Paramount
item.description: Stephen Colbert ended his tenure as host of 'The Late Show' on a largely celebratory note, while also including humorous critiques aimed at CBS and its parent company, Paramount. The final episode fea...

item.title: Melbourne Homes with Exceptional Kitchens: A Look at Five Stunning Properties
item.description: Kitchens have evolved beyond mere practicality to become the heart of the home, serving as spaces for cooking, entertaining, and family gatherings. In Melbourne, several properties are leading the way...

item.title: NPFL Season Ends With Two Trophies Ready as Rangers and Rivers United Battle for Title
item.description: The Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) season for 2025/26 don reach final day and e don turn to real wahala as both Enugu Rangers and Rivers United dey fight for the league crown. Rangers dey lead...

item.title: Liberal MPs express internal concerns over federal environmental policies and Alberta pipeline deal
item.description: Fourteen Liberal Members of Parliament from across Canada have privately expressed concern over recent federal decisions affecting environmental regulations. Ahead of the federal government's new agre...

item.title: Winners of the 2026 Ivor Novello Awards Recognised for Songwriting Excellence
item.description: The 2026 Ivor Novello Awards celebrated outstanding songwriting across the UK and internationally. Geordie singer Sam Fender received the prestigious Songwriter of the Year award, praised for his emot...

item.title: Anmol alias Pinky placed under 14-day judicial remand in multiple narcotics and murder cases
item.description: KARACHI: Anmol, also known as Pinky, who is alleged to be a major figure in drug trafficking, was placed under a 14-day judicial remand on Friday. She faces multiple narcotics cases as well as a murde...
